eventTitle: Blueprint: The Power of Community | Miami
description:
**ADDRESS UPDATE: Due to weather, our new location is:**

**Of Course I Still Love You (OCISLY) Ceramics**

**5400 NE 4th Court, Miami FL 33137**

***Please park in the pay-to-park spots in our lot and make your way through the double glass doors right next to the spiral staircase.***

Community is one of the most powerful forces behind successful brands. When people feel like they’re part of something, they bring friends, spread the word, and keep coming back.

In this Blueprint Panel, we’re bringing together industry leaders who have built strong communities to share what’s actually worked for them. From turning first-time attendees into regulars to activating your most engaged supporters, we’ll break down how community drives real growth.

We’ll be co-hosting this conversation with our Miami Posh partners, **The Hungry Post**, local tastemakers and a prime example of building a thriving community.

Expect honest insights, practical ideas, and real examples from those who’ve seen the impact of community firsthand. Come for the conversation, stay for some [Casalú](https://www.instagram.com/drinkcasalu/), and connect with fellow organizers and industry leaders.

**Panelists:**

- Ricardo Sucre, *Casalú*
- Will Thompson, *Sunny's*
- Caroline Strauss, *Magie*
- Daniela Bao, *Posh*

**Moderated by** [The Hungry Post](https://www.instagram.com/thehungrypost)

*Doors at 6:00PM | Panel starts at 6:30PM*
shortDescription: A panel discussion on how building a strong community can drive organic growth.

description:
We're launching our first ever Pickle popup store!!

And we're kicking it off by hosting a private preview ahead of launch, as part of our Built by Her tour.

Join us for a series of fireside chats featuring industry leaders, content creators, and more influential voices in fashion, consumer & tech.

Featuring fireside chats with:\
⚡**Natalie Barbu** | Creator & Founder of **Rella**, a fast-growing platform helping creators and brands plan and manage their content.\
⚡ **Hye Young Kim** - Founder of **OLIVIA UMMA**, a Korean-inspired skincare brand that just got picked up by in 250+ Sephora stores.\
⚡**Kate Cassidy** | Creator **@kateecass** with over 3M followers across platforms.\
⚡ **Julia O'Mara** | Co-Founder of **Pickle**, the peer to peer fashion rental platform where you can rent and buy from the best closets across the US\
More speakers to be announced!

Limited spots, so reserve yours asap!

Dress Code: Time to Shine

Need inspo? Check out Pickle so you can rent the perfect look! <https://pickle.onelink.me/sL3L/w2gryxwv>

Doors open at 5:30 for the sip & shop. Our first fireside chat will be kicking off at 6:30pm sharp!\
\
Enjoy complimentary:\
🕶 Sunglasses from SoBe Sunglasses\
💎 Jewelry from Lankri's Jewelry\
🍷 Drinks from Hampton Water\
🥤 Sips from Benny\
🎁 $20 Pickle gift cards

Your ticket includes:\
⚡Access to a series of fireside chats featuring founders, content creators and other leaders in the fashion & consumer industries\
🛍 Entry into our pop-up shopping experience with an exclusive preview of the Pickle Miami popup\
👗 A $20 gift card to use in the Pickle store through opening weekend (valid 3/19-3/22)\
🍷 Complimentary drinks\
🤝 Opportunities to network & mingle with like-minded women in the fashion & consumer spaces

More on Pickle: Pickle is a peer-to-peer clothing rental platform where women can rent and lend what’s trending directly from each other’s closets. Over 350K items, no subscriptions, free to download. Local rentals with same-day delivery, or ship from closets nationwide. Don't have an account yet? It's free to download: <https://pickle.onelink.me/sL3L/w0c3c7k0>

Join us for the next **Music Industry Meetup** on **Friday, March 20th at 6:00 PM at Sable in Downtown Miami.**

This in-person event brings together Miami’s music creators, professionals, and rising talent in a space built for real connection. Whether you’re a producer, artist, DJ, songwriter, manager, executive, or building behind the scenes, this is an opportunity to meet the right people and strengthen your presence in the local scene.

This event is a great fit if you:

– Work in or around the music industry\
– Are looking to collaborate with other artists and creatives\
– Want to expand your network with industry professionals\
– Are seeking performance opportunities or label connections\
– Offer services to artists and music businesses

Expect a strong turnout of local talent, creative brands, and industry representatives, plus guest speakers, live DJs and curated music throughout the evening.

Music Industry Meetups is about more than networking, it’s about building a real community in Miami’s music scene.

If you’re serious about growing in music, be in the room.

Location: Sable – 2219 NW 2nd Ave, Miami, FL 33127\
Time: 6:00 PM\
Date: Friday, March 20th

We look forward to seeing you there.

Step into the ultimate Music Week experience at the EDMA Pool Party, hosted poolside at the iconic Clevelander South Beach. This is where electronic music’s biggest names, industry tastemakers, celebrities, and fans collide under the Miami sun.

Powered by iHeartRadio and leading into Ultra Music Festival weekend, the EDMA Pool Party delivers nonstop, high-energy performances and unforgettable surprise moments in a luxury day-party atmosphere overlooking Ocean Drive.

Rub elbows with celebrities, A-list DJs, and industry executives while enjoying power-packed sets from this year’s winners and some of the hottest names in electronic music. No long speeches. No slow moments. Just pure energy from start to finish.

With Miami’s ocean views as your backdrop, immerse yourself in an exclusive experience that has become a must-attend destination for EDM superfans and insiders alike.

If you want to be where the industry actually gathers during Music Week - this is it.

tickets.description: Exclusive tickets to the EDMAs are complimentary but limited and not guaranteed. Tickets are available on a first-come, first-served basis, with a limit of one ticket per registration. Event Details: Doors Open: 11AM - Age Requirement: 21+ Please note that while your ticket provides access to the event, entry is subject to the venue's capacity. Guests who already have a "Shift Miami Access Pass" or a "Meduza/James Hype EDMA Multi Pass" will enjoy the same access privileges as those holding an EDMA Pool Party ticket. However, to secure your spot, we strongly recommend arriving prior to 12 PM to ensure a smooth check-in process. Admission cannot be guaranteed once the venue reaches maximum capacity, so early arrival is encouraged to ensure you can fully enjoy this exclusive EDMA Pool Party experience.

tickets.name: Skip The Line Pass
tickets.description:
**EDMAs Skip-the-Line Priority Ticket**

This **Skip-the-Line Priority Ticket is a General Admission (GA) ticket that allows you to bypass the Free RSVP General Admission line and enter the EDMAs through the priority entrance**, giving you faster and more reliable access to the event. **This ticket alone grants you entry to the EDMAs and no additional RSVP, ticket, or pass is required.** **All proceeds from these Skip-the-Line Priority Tickets will be donated to Hope Bridge USA.** This access pass also allows you to **pick up your credentials early at any SHIFT Miami ticket check-in location in the days prior to the event**, so you can arrive already credentialed and avoid dealing with check-in the day of the event. A **very limited number** of these Priority Tickets are available for guests who want to guarantee smoother entry without waiting in the Free RSVP General Admission line. While standard EDMA invitations and RSVPs are complimentary, they operate on a **first-come, first-served basis and are subject to venue capacity**, which may result in long lines or delayed entry during peak arrival times. If you want to **guarantee faster entry and avoid waiting**, this ticket allows you to bypass the general admission line and use the **Skip-the-Line priority entrance**. If you already have a **free RSVP ticket, SHIFT Miami Access Pass, or EDMA Multi Pass**, you may still purchase this Skip-the-Line Priority Ticket to upgrade your entry experience. Each Skip-the-Line ticket is **valid for one individual only**, and **every person must have their own Skip-the-Line ticket** to use the priority entrance—one guest cannot purchase a ticket and bring additional people through the priority line. **Doors open at 11:00 AM** and the event is **21+**. **All sales are final with no refunds**, the event takes place **rain or shine**, and **chargebacks or payment disputes will not be honored**. The **terms and conditions for this ticket are the same as those governing the SHIFT Miami Pool Party tickets**, and by purchasing this ticket you agree to those same terms and conditions, so please review the SHIFT Miami Pool Party ticket terms for full details.

description:
For the past 10 years, Beyond Brunch Sundays has evolved into South Florida’s #1 urban brunch experience. This isn’t just a brunch; it’s a cultural movement! We’ve expanded to feature celebrity guest performers, creative themed events, and the ultimate vibes that keep our guests coming back every week.

Themes like Dukes & Boots, FreakNik, Divine 9, and our Camo Brunch keep each week fresh and exciting.

Complimentary bottle awarded to the Littest table of the day – bring the energy!

Enjoy creative games and unforgettable moments that make every Sunday unique.

At 5:30 PM, we transition into BB Sunsets a Caribbean-inspired day party to close out the evening.

***$50 includes unlimited food from 11 AM to 5 PM.***\
\
The Menu

Our food offerings change weekly to complement the theme of the party! From BBQ ribs and chicken for Labor Day to special tequila drinks for Cinco de Mayo, we bring creativity to the table. Some staples include:

Shrimp & Grits

Chicken & Waffles

Lobster Mac & Cheese

Beef, Chicken, and Ham & Cheese Empanadas

Made-to-order Omelets

Carving Station featuring premium meats

Add mimosas at the bar for $20, or get complimentary unlimited mimosas from 11 AM - 1 PM with online ticket purchase!

Location:

Club Vault

2801 Greene Street Hollywood, FL

Reservations:

Call The Big Three at 754-400-0378.

✨ Sponsored by Efendee Studio– Use code FND for 10% off all services/bookings at [EfendeeStudio.com](http://efendeestudio.com/)!

Secure your spot now and join the brunch party that’s redefining Sundays!

Miami’s **Sunshine Disco** is LEVELING UP for Vol. 4! 🌞 | All Day Dancing | Premium 4-Point Sound System | Outdoor Garden | Drinks & Bites | DJ SUB ZERO & DJ GOOD EAR _disco vinyl legends_ | & Fun Surprises

With love,  
**The Boogie Committee**

description:
Subsolar Music teams up with DTLA Records for a late-night showcase bringing together cutting-edge house sounds from both coasts. On Wednesday, March 25th, we take over Cucu’s Nest in Miami Beach for an intimate, high-energy session featuring a stacked lineup of artists from both labels.

Expect driving basslines, hypnotic grooves, rolling percussion, and that raw underground energy that defines Miami Music Week. From deep and minimal to peak-time house heaters, this is a curated night built for true dance floor heads.

Two labels. One room. No filler.

Whether you’re in town for the week or a Miami local, this is where the real ones will be.

Doors open at 7PM Music goes late 21+

Follow Subsolar Music & DTLA Records for lineup announcements and ticket info.

Join us every Thursday for a sultry evening filled with smooth R&B beats, great music, and good vibes. Whether you're unwinding after work or looking to kickstart your weekend early, **S.O.S. Thursdays** has everything you need for an unforgettable night.

**What to Expect:**

*   **2-for-1 Drinks:** From 7 PM - 10 PM during Happy Hour
*   **Delicious Food:** Savor tasty appetizers and bites throughout the night brought to you by Wrapcity
*   **Top R&B Hits:** Our DJs will spin the best of all things R&B and Soul
*   **Sexy Ambiance:** A grown and sophisticated vibe perfect for relaxing or dancing
*   **Dress Code:** Grown and sexy—think stylish, sophisticated, and elegant attire

21+ Event Valid ID Required Upon Entry

description:
*Miami Music Week begins here.*

Before the world descends on Miami for the biggest week in electronic music, MAD Live opens MMW 2026 with the night that sets the tone.

Located in the heart of Wynwood, MAD Live is one of Miami's premier nightlife destinations — state-of-the-art sound system, immersive lighting, and an intimate 800-capacity room that keeps the energy focused and the vibe unmatched. The venue has hosted some of the biggest names in dance music and remains a staple for industry tastemakers every Music Week.

This year, MAD kicks off MMW with 10+ curated selectors bringing an underground-to-peak-time journey through the best of electronic music.

Limited capacity — early tickets strongly recommended

21+ | Miami Music Week 2026

_**FREE ENTRY BEFORE MIDNIGHT WITH RSVP**_

***SHIFT* Miami** is the next evolution of Miami’s dance-music week, built for artists, industry, and fans who want real access, real connections, and unforgettable moments. Taking place during Miami’s annual dance-music week in March, *SHIFT* brings the global music community together for a **multi-day, multi-venue** run of events, showcases, networking opportunities, and cultural moments across Miami Beach—where rising talent meets industry power players through one-on-one sessions with key decision-makers, demo drops, meet & greets, poolside experiences, and intimate gatherings designed to create real opportunities, real connections, and unforgettable moments with performances from some of the world’s most sought-after DJs.

Last year, our team produced programming in Miami featuring world-class artists such as Above & Beyond, Afrojack, ALOK, Aluna, Armin van Buuren, Becky Hill, Bonnie x Clyde, Cedric Gervais, Cheat Codes, Crystal Waters, D.O.D, Frank Walker, Hardwell, HAYLA, Hugel, Joel Corry, KSHMR, Laidback Luke, Meduza, Sickick, Steve Aoki, Subtronics, and others—alongside industry leaders from 88rising, Armada, Beatport, Billboard, Defected, Dim Mak, DJ Mag, Dirtybird, EDM.com, Neon Owl, Red Light Management, Sony, SoundCloud, Splice, STMPD, Spotify, The Orchard, Ultra Records, Warner, Wasserman, and more. With *SHIFT* Miami, we’re bringing that same level of talent, access, and opportunity to a new experience built for today’s dance-music community.

**No gatekeepers. No limits. Just real access to the people, platforms, and opportunities that move dance music forward.**

**Insider Sessions & Industry Access**\
Experience intimate conversations with artists, innovators, and industry leaders shaping the future of electronic music. Step inside exclusive talks, mentorship moments, and behind-the-scenes insights designed to inspire, inform, and elevate your journey.

**Networking Without Barriers**\
Connect with A&Rs, managers, agents, curators, producers, DJs, vocalists, and music professionals through curated networking experiences built for real interaction, real collaboration, and real opportunity.

**Access to Exclusive Events**\
Your *SHIFT* pass includes entry to select parties, showcases, poolside events, and nightlife experiences — capped off with Friday, March 27th’s private EDMAs Pool Party. Since tickets to the EDMAs cannot be purchased and attendance is invite-only, your *SHIFT* pass provides access to this exclusive event alongside artists, industry, and VIP guests.

*SHIFT* offers multiple ticket types, and access may vary by pass. Some premium ticket types and add-on experiences will be announced at a later date. Your Access Pass gives you entry to the core *SHIFT* experience across participating venues in South Beach. As new experiences open, it will be up to you to reserve your spot or upgrade your pass if you’d like to join those activations. All events are subject to venue capacity, and early arrival or advance reservation is encouraged for popular sessions.

[Click here for SHIFT Miami 2026 - Ticketing Terms and Conditions](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/1ob54sci5hcage2s7hsr3/By-purchasing-you-agree-to-the-official-SHIFT-MIAMI-Terms-Conditions-Liability-Waiver-PDF.pdf?rlkey=h1xhfkrblkvoa9xfotrwjgrrx&dl=0)

description:
Join ***Run 0440***, Miami Beach’s elite endurance crew, for a two-day wellness experience built around performance, community, and data-driven health.

This pop-up brings together athletes, runners, and health-focused individuals who care about optimizing their body and understanding their performance metrics. Throughout the event, attendees can participate in biomarker testing stations to gain insights into key body metrics, connect with top wellness and recovery brands activating in the space, and learn from industry leaders during our wellness panel focused on performance, recovery, and longevity.

The weekend will also feature a community 5K run through Miami Beach and an athlete mixer, creating the perfect environment to meet like-minded people who are passionate about training, recovery, and pushing their limits.

Whether you're a competitive athlete, a dedicated runner, or simply someone invested in improving your health and performance, this event is designed to bring together a community that moves with intention.

Bring a friend, meet new training partners, and spend the weekend surrounded by people who care about how their body performs, recovers, and evolves.

Hosted by ***Run 0440***, Miami Beach’s elite endurance community.

@run0440 on IG

description:
## **VØLTAGE HAUS**

**Music x Fashion x Art x Ink**

This Miami Music Week, three of Miami’s fastest-rising creative forces unite for one night only: **Sunset Penthouse x Donny’s Devil x SKN Tattoo Collective.**

We’re taking over Shiso in Wynwood from 7PM to 3AM. Think New York edge meets Tulum after-dark energy.

On the decks: a curated lineup of tech house, Latin house, and Afro house heavy hitters

**DRASEN · JØSHIBUYA · PENSIÓN · VITTØ VØN DØN + special guests**

Expect immersive fashion moments from Donny’s Devil models in rave couture, multiple live runway walks throughout the night, and exclusive tattoo experiences by SKN Tattoo Collective.

This is not just a party. It’s a collision of culture.

### **About the Collaborators**

**Sunset Penthouse**

Brickell-based DJ collective and creative community redefining Miami nightlife. Known for expressive penthouse gatherings and luxury venue takeovers including Giselle and Rosa Sky, Sunset Penthouse curates high-vibration, underground-leaning music experiences with elevated energy.

**Donny’s Devil**

A Miami-based creative community centered on women’s empowerment and bold self-expression. Blending fashion, events, and artistic collaboration, Donny’s Devil brings fearless energy to every space they enter.

**SKN Tattoo Collective**

An upscale private studio where ink becomes intimate storytelling. SKN merges fine artistry with meticulous craftsmanship, offering a refined, immersive tattoo experience.

description:
From 9:00 PM until 3:00 AM, the night rises above Wynwood at Astra Rooftop, located at 2121 NW 2nd Ave, Miami, FL 33127. Inspired by the goddess of stars, Astra offers an open-air rooftop experience with breathtaking skyline views, handcrafted cocktails, Mediterranean flavors, and the unmistakable pulse of Miami after dark.

Expect a captivating fusion of deep, afro, melodic house, indie dance, and tech-house, curated by globally recognized artists and Miami’s rising selectors alike. With releases on top-tier labels, international support, and dance floors across the world under their belts, featured DJs bring a refined yet high-energy sound designed to build momentum and hold the rooftop from start to finish. Every set is intentional, blending technical precision with an instinctive connection to the crowd.

As midnight approaches, the energy intensifies. The breeze moves through the terrace, the lights glow against the skyline, and the music locks the dancefloor into a shared rhythm under the stars. From warm-up grooves to peak-hour moments, Astra delivers a seamless journey built for those who crave both atmosphere and sound.

Guests are encouraged to bring positive energy and respect for the space and one another. 21+ only. All ticket sales are final.
